name: Transformanji
description:
Staying over with friends when one of them pulls out a strange boardgame. Sexy chaos ensues.

Alright, Imma go ahead and release this one. It works pretty well for the other 3's turns, but when it gets to your turn it runs into the problem of requiring too much short back and forth, so unless you're okay with the AI acting for you you'll probably have to roll, then at least erase everything after it tells you what card you got, then react accordingly. I doubt there is a fix for this with the way this system works currently, but if yall come up with one please let me know.
creator: xXEndeadXx
